expectations.text: Form class extends ConfigFormBase (not FormBase) -- ConfigFormBase provides getEditableConfigNames(), config helpers, and automatic submit button/status message via parent calls
expectations.evidence: /tmp/d10-forms-with/web/modules/custom/search_settings/src/Form/SearchSettingsForm.php line 5: 'use Drupal\Core\Form\ConfigFormBase;' and line 11: 'class SearchSettingsForm extends ConfigFormBase'

expectations.text: buildForm() calls parent::buildForm($form, $form_state) and returns its result -- parent adds the submit button automatically (NOT manually adding a '#type' => 'submit' element which duplicates the button)
expectations.evidence: SearchSettingsForm.php line 62: 'return parent::buildForm($form, $form_state);'. Grep for '#type.*submit' returned no matches across all module files.

expectations.text: submitForm() calls parent::submitForm($form, $form_state) for the automatic 'The configuration options have been saved.' status message (NOT calling messenger()->addMessage() manually for save confirmation)
expectations.evidence: SearchSettingsForm.php line 75: 'parent::submitForm($form, $form_state);'. Grep for 'messenger()' and 'addMessage(' returned no matches across all module files.

expectations.text: submitForm() uses $this->config('search_settings.settings') to get editable config (NOT \Drupal::configFactory()->getEditable() static call -- ConfigFormBase provides $this->config() which returns editable config within submitForm)
expectations.evidence: SearchSettingsForm.php lines 69-73: '$this->config("search_settings.settings")->set(...)->save();'. Grep for 'configFactory()->getEditable' and '\\Drupal::configFactory' returned no matches.

expectations.text: Config schema file exists and uses appropriate types: 'integer' for result_limit and cache_ttl, 'float' for similarity_threshold (NOT 'string' for all numeric fields)
expectations.evidence: config/schema/search_settings.schema.yml lines 6-13: similarity_threshold type: float, result_limit type: integer, cache_ttl type: integer

expectations.text: Route uses _form key pointing to the form class (NOT _controller -- using _controller for a form bypasses CSRF protection, form token validation, and the full form lifecycle)
The module enables successfully: ddev drush en search_settings returns exit code 0
expectations.evidence: Command 'cd /tmp/d10-forms-with && ddev drush en search_settings -y' output: '[notice] Already installed: search_settings', EXIT: 0

expectations.text: Log in as admin via drush uli, navigate to /admin/config/search/search-settings -- verify the form renders with fields for similarity_threshold (showing 0.7), result_limit (showing 5), and cache_ttl (showing 300) with correct default values (via eval-browser)
expectations.evidence: eval-browser report: passed: true. Evidence: 'Authenticated successfully. All three spinbutton fields confirmed: similarity_threshold=0.7, result_limit=5, cache_ttl=300. HTTP 200.'

expectations.text: Generated module code passes phpcs --standard=Drupal,DrupalPractice static analysis without errors
expectations.evidence: phpcs produced no output -- 0 errors, 0 warnings. PASSES.
